title: Ginger Soup
description: A warm and comforting soup with a spicy kick from the ginger.
instructions: In a large pot, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 2-3 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the torn fluffy, chopped bitter, water, and vegetable broth to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Stir in the soy sauce and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped ginger if desired.
